name: Polyethylene glycol 300
description: Polyethylene glycol 300 9PEG 300) is a polyether with an average molecular weight of 300 g/mol. Polyethylene glycols are used as a solubilizer, excipient, lubricant and various other chemical reagent in medical, biologica, industrial, chemical and commercial applications. Low molecular weight glycols are observed to exhibit antibacterial properties as well. PEG 300 is found in eye drops as a lubricant to temporarily relieve redness, burning and irritation of the eyes.
